title: KKTN-013 Business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Koyuki-chan 39 years old Koyuki Amano
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Koyuki, a beautiful mature woman with an adult sex appeal. Bringing an acme exercise bike to such a Japanese-style room with a beautiful Japanese beauty is a really bad project. Mr. Koyuki is an unfussy person, but once he straddles an exercise bike, his face is full of sex appeal, and he is captivated by the pleasure while sweating. If you see a mature woman riding a bicycle in the city from now on, you will surely be excited to remember Mr. Koyuki.
